personal_note: This week's build logs all rhymed in a way I didn't expect. Writing OpsPilot's vision, I started from my own workflow and had to force myself to ask who this was actually for — the answer reshaped the whole product. Writing PolicyForge's vision, I role-played as someone with zero cybersecurity background just to catch the questions a real consultant would ask. And working through Social Engagement Radar's goals, I kept asking "why" until "reduce effort" turned into something I could actually measure. Same lesson, three times over: the first answer you write down is rarely the real one. You have to keep digging before you build.
subject: This week: three product visions, one lesson
